title: hypericum dolabriforme
intro: Hypericum dolabriforme, also known as the wedge-leaf St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant belonging to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Hypericum dolabriforme include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
